nasb.text: As for My flock, they must eat what you tread down with your feet and drink what you foul with your feet!’ ”

esv.text: And must my sheep eat what you have trodden with your feet, and drink what you have muddied with your feet?

cnv.text: 我的羊，就只能吃你們用腳踐踏過的，喝你們用腳攪濁了的。

ccb.text: 我其余的羊只得吃你们践踏的草，喝你们搅浑的水。
